info.title: HackerOne API
info.description: HackerOne is a bug bounty and vulnerability coordination platform. The API enables management of vulnerability reports, programs, bounties, structured scopes, weaknesses, credentials, and swag awards.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all vulnerability reports.
Retrieve a specific vulnerability report by ID.

put.description: Change the state of a vulnerability report.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of your programs.

BasicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Authentication using your HackerOne API username and API token.
